## Fixed
- Tools and armor can now be repaired in an anvil using Lonsdaleite gems — Perfect-tier gear uses Perfect Lonsdaleite gems. Previously they could not be repaired with the intended material.
- Lonsdaleite armor (both tiers) can now be enchanted at an enchanting table and anvil. It was previously missing from the armor enchantment categories entirely.

## Changed
- Lonsdaleite armor now uses its own texture when worn, instead of appearing as vanilla diamond or netherite armor.
